goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'leicester' and should 'arrive by 16:15'.
The train should leave on 'saturday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'price'.
You are also looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'club salsa'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'attraction type'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from leicester and should arrive by 16:15
The train should leave on saturday and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get travel time and price
You are also looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called club salsa
Make sure you get phone number and attraction type
